old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.4.2","title":"Handle link context entropy failure","description":"Review during 2auf.35.4 found lichen_link_init ignores sys_csrand_get/getentropy results and may derive epoch from an indeterminate byte. Make initialization fail closed or use a documented deterministic fallback only where explicitly safe; add fault-injection coverage.","acceptance_criteria":"Entropy failure cannot consume uninitialized data; callers receive a deterministic documented error/fallback; Zephyr and POSIX failure tests pass; three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T15:23:05.993876Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T15:23:05.993876Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.4.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T15:42:21.339559Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Fixed: lichen_link_init obtains entropy before any ctx mutation and returns -EIO on sys_csrand_get/getentropy failure (no indeterminate bytes); added Zephyr/POSIX fault tests; Rust lichen-link and C tests/clippy pass. See lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c:146
